description: Convenient Location near Las Vegas Strip Desert Rose Resort offers a peaceful retreat just moments away from the vibrant Las Vegas Strip. Escape the casino atmosphere and relax in our oasis-like setting with a heated outdoor pool surrounded by palm trees. Modern Suites with Full Kitchen Our contemporary suites are designed for comfort and convenience, featuring free WiFi, a private balcony, and a fully equipped kitchen. Enjoy your favorite shows on the TV with cable channels and brew a fresh cup of coffee with the in-room coffee machine. Amenities for Relaxation and Convenience Indulge in our whirlpool and stay active in the fitness center. Take advantage of the barbecue area, convenience st
importantInfo: Guests under the age of 21 can only check in with a parent or official guardian. The construction of a brand-new baseball stadium for the Oakland Athletics has begun directly next to the Desert Rose Resort and is projected to last until early 2028. Please pardon their dust, noise, and potential road closures that may impact your stay as they make way for this exciting new bucket-list-worthy attraction.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Entertainment and Dining Unwind by the outdoor swimming pool or enjoy a relaxing soak in the hot tub. Savor delectable meals at the on-site restaurant and sip on cocktails at the trendy bar. Convenient Location Located just steps away from the iconic Fremont Street Experience, our hotel offers easy access to popular attractions like The Mob Museum and The Neon Museum. Ready to experience the ultimate Las Vegas getaway? Book your stay at Circa Resort & Casino - A
importantInfo: Complimentary daily admission to the Stadium Swim aqua theater and pool complex is offered to all registered resort guests. Admission includes entry only with premium seating available at an additional fee. Capacity restrictions and occasional weather-related and private event closures may apply.
